body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage — Needs Manual Review

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Decision</summary>

- **Candidate labels considered:**
  - `Client` + (service label?) — `Azure.SdkAnalyzers` is SDK code/tooling in `sdk/tools/`, which could loosely fit "Client" category, but no clear matching service label exists in the repository for this package
  - `Central-EngSys` + (service label?) — This package is internal engineering tooling, making "Central-EngSys" a plausible category, but this label is **excluded** from automatic triage (requires human judgment)
  - `CodeGen` (service label) — Only applies to code generation issues in `/eng/packages/`; this package is in `sdk/tools/`, not `/eng/packages/`, so CodeGen does not apply
- **Confidence blockers:**
  - No unambiguous service label maps to `Azure.SdkAnalyzers` (an internal-only Roslyn analyzer package in `sdk/tools/`)
  - The closest category label (`Central-EngSys`) is excluded from automatic triage
  - No quality reference issues (with `customer-reported` + `issue-addressed`) were found for this package to guide label selection
- **Outcome:** Applied `needs-triage` — could not confidently predict labels

</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **CODEOWNERS scan:** Owner lookup was not performed — label prediction did not reach confidence threshold

</details>
